How it Works Our Impact Contact Us

Celebrate Life by Growing Life

Don't just give a gift that fades. Plant a living legacy. We plant a real tree in your name for every birthday, anniversary, and festival.

Start Your Legacy

Choose Your Celebration

🎂

Birthday Trees

Mark another year of life with a tree that will grow for decades. Includes a personalized digital certificate.

💍

Weddings & Anniversaries

Plant a "Love Tree" to symbolize your growing relationship. Perfect for wedding favors or anniversary gifts.

🎉

Festivals & Holidays

Give the gift of nature this Diwali, Christmas, or Thanksgiving. A gift that gives back to the planet.

How It Works

1

Choose a Tree

Select the type of tree (Fruit, Oak, Pine) and the region where you want it planted.

2

Make it Personal

Add a message for the recipient. We will send them a digital card with the GPS coordinates.

3

We Plant It

Our partners plant the tree in reforestation zones. You receive photos and updates.

Our Growing Impact

Every tree planted helps fight climate change and restores biodiversity.

10,000+

Trees Planted

500+
